reason: The verification found multiple issues including a potentially infinite path-search loop and top-level pandapower imports that violate requirements; these are blocking defects for reliable production use. They must be fixed and re-verified. The script otherwise implements the intended workflow, so another iteration focused on targeted code fixes, improved error handling, and additional verification will likely converge to an acceptable solution.

specific_areas: Fix the parent-directory search loop to stop at filesystem root and raise a clear error if 'citylearn' isn't found
Make pandapower imports optional (lazy/try-except) and only require pandapower when grid_model='pandapower'
Correct the typo in MultiObjectiveReward.calculate observation key check ('/line_loading' -> 'line_loading')
Add runtime checks/tests that exercise both opendss and pandapower code paths (including the case where pandapower is absent)
Add unit tests for the reward logic and for the module-level path discovery
Add defensive programming and clear error messages for other potential failure modes
Run static analysis/linting and re-run the verification suite after fixes

task_understanding.adjustments: Be explicit about required constraints up-front: avoid mandatory pandapower imports for OpenDSS workflows; ensure all module-level operations are safe failing (no infinite loops, no heavy imports). Document expected behavior for missing optional dependencies.

data_analysis.adjustments: Not applicable for this iteration (issues are code-level and dependency/logic related rather than data-quality related).

model_planning.adjustments: Plan tests and validation steps into the code-generation phase: include unit tests for reward computation and path discovery, and integration tests that run minimal end-to-end simulations for both grid_model options (opendss and pandapower) where feasible.

code_generation.adjustments: Apply the recommended code patches: (1) stop climbing parents at filesystem root and raise FileNotFoundError if 'citylearn' not found, (2) wrap pandapower imports in try/except and provide clear ImportError when pandapower is required, (3) fix the '/line_loading' typo, and (4) insert guard-clauses and clearer error messaging. Produce minimal, well-tested diffs rather than large rewrites.

code_verification.adjustments: Expand verification to include: import-time checks (no heavy optional imports at top-level), unit tests for reward logic, tests that simulate absence of pandapower, and a run of the baseline+add-capacitor+re-run workflow on a small test case. Include assertions for expected exceptions and for the presence of KPI and plot outputs.

simulation_execution.adjustments: When testing, execute the workflow with grid_model='opendss' (ensuring it works without pandapower installed) and, if pandapower is available, with grid_model='pandapower'. Capture and check logs, outputs, and KPIs to verify the end-to-end flow.

result_evaluation.adjustments: After fixes, re-run the verification suite and compare results to ensure the previously reported issues are resolved. Evaluate whether the reward calculations and observation checks behave as expected and whether the code no longer forces unnecessary dependencies.

feedback_generation.adjustments: Provide precise, actionable feedback and code diffs for each detected issue. For future iterations, include expected unit test descriptions and minimal reproduction snippets that demonstrate both the failure and the expected corrected behavior.
